channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Big Tech exodus: the non-money reasons in 2026
item.description: Cut on-call pages 62% and promotion cycles 50% — the non-money reasons senior engineers left big tech in 2026 and what to check first

item.title: Skip the degree, learn systems
item.description: Cut 47 minutes of Redis outages and $18k in SLA penalties by learning systems without a CS degree. Real failure modes, tools, and habits that move you from junior to senior in 18 months.

item.title: Don't guess—measure your pool size
item.description: Cut API response time 70% by fixing connection pool misconfigurations — connection establishment time, not query time, is the real bottleneck in 2026 systems.

item.title: 2026 salaries: prompts vs embeddings data
item.description: Cut AI salary offers $60k by choosing prompt vs embeddings in 2026 — latency, token costs, and compliance numbers from 47 audited systems. Regulated domains pay top dollar for embeddings engineering.

item.title: Rebuilt my freelance dev system
item.description: Your client dashboard shows 92% utilisation, but the fine print says ‘utilisation after context switching.’ I once billed 112 hours in a single week on…

item.title: Vector DB or not? Benchmark the gap
item.description: pgvector 0.7 vs Milvus 2.4 benchmark: measure the 95th percentile gap before buying a vector database. Save $1k/month on embeddings with the right index first.

item.title: Run LLMs locally on laptops — real limits
item.description: Cut local LLM latency 60% with CPU inference on a laptop — 7B models, 4-bit quantization, and the thermal throttling mistake most guides ignore

item.title: RAG pipelines: Lessons from 3 million queries
item.description: Cut RAG vector search costs 70% with hybrid pipelines — exact-match filters, dynamic pruning, and the recall trap most teams miss.

item.title: Reduce cloud carbon 30% sustainably
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 30% without slowing code — Lambda arm64, Aurora Serverless v2, and Redis two-tier caching in a real Latin American health-tech API.

item.title: AI tools that turned non-devs into solo founders
item.description: Cut dev time 10x with 3 stacks that actually scale — concrete costs, benchmarks, and the free-tier gotchas most tutorials skip. Proven in 2026 production.

item.title: Double your remote salary: the ask script
item.description: Negotiate remote salary for lower-cost countries — median uplift $12,400 in 2026 using Levels.fyi, Mercer PPP, and a one-page PDF ask

item.title: Over-engineered? You’re burning cash now
item.description: Cut cloud costs 80% and latency 14x by replacing Kafka + Redis Streams with PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY and SSE in a real-time dashboard — the simplicity strategy most teams skip.

item.title: Build one killer project from Africa
item.description: Build one polished service, not five projects, to land remote roles from Africa — production-ready code beats toy apps every time

item.title: 5G backends: tiny settings with big latency
item.description: Cut mobile API p99 latency 65% with Redis 7.2, Go connection pools, and 5G-specific tweaks — the three gotchas most teams miss

item.title: 5 signals to watch in LLM pipelines
item.description: Reduce LLM pipeline outages 60% with 5 signals: queue depth, cache hit ratio, latency, empty responses, and token rate. Real 2026 numbers and code for FastAPI, vLLM, Prometheus, and OTel.

item.title: Choose WebSocket, SSE, or long-poll in 5 minutes
item.description: Cut real-time update latency 60% by picking WebSocket, SSE, or long-poll based on 2026 production data from 1000 concurrent users on Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2

item.title: AI reads your repo: when context fails
item.description: Cut AI review mistakes 85% with repo context fidelity metrics — static vs dynamic call site coverage and behavioral traces with OpenTelemetry 1.42.0

item.title: Freelance burnout: what fixed the code freeze
item.description: Turns out my brain was the leaky component—VS Code’s memory usage actually dropped 18% after I fixed my sleep schedule.

item.title: Portfolio that hires you: not projects, not LeetCode
item.description: Build one production system, not three projects: €65k remote offers from Nairobi using Python 3.11, FastAPI 0.104 and CloudWatch metrics.

item.title: Repository intelligence: AI can't see your call graphs
item.description: Cut false positives 44% by instrumenting repository intelligence — measure symbol tables, call graphs, and constraints before trusting AI suggestions. 2026 guide with Python 3.11, OpenTelemetry 1.25, and Redis 7.2.
